title: Pilosella sparsa
taxonomy: Pilosella sparsa is a species within the genus Pilosella, which is a group of plants in the tribe Cichorieae of the family Asteraceae. This genus is part of the larger clade known as the dandelion clade, which includes many similar-looking plants. Pilosella species are often considered to be closely related to the genus Hieracium, although they are typically distinguished by their unique characteristics. The classification of Pilosella sparsa can vary depending on the specific taxonomic system used, but it is generally accepted to be a member of the Asteraceae family. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary history and its relationships with other similar species.
